'''Ebla grain''' was a [[Grain/Legends|grain]] [[Plant/Legends|plant]] that grew on [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]]. It was used to make [[Ebla beer/Legends|Ebla beer]].<ref name="GSWU" />
